case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $400.00 U.S. CURR et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $400.00 U.S. CURR ENCY; $2,959.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA FRIEDMAN, JASON BARBETTA, JESSICA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,679.50 BE RELEASED TO ERIC SAFIRE ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT JASON FRIEDMAN AND JOHN FORSYTH ON BEHALF OF JESSICA BARBETTA. IT IF FURTHER ORDERED THAT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,679.50 IS DECLARED FORFEITED AS AGAINST ANY AND ALL INTERESTED PARTIES AND BE DISPOSED AS PROVIDED BY H&S CODE 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY ALL PARTIES. PARTIES TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUITE AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
